case_title: KAMILAH TAYLOR VS. MARIA PATRICIA PILAR AUSTRIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, KAMILAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTRIA, MARIA PATRICIA PILAR $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
